title: Edible Glistering Melons
description: Makes glistering (golden) melons edible and have the same nutrition/saturation as golden carrots.
body:
This mod makes the glistering melons edible, giving them the same food "power" as golden carrots, because why isnt this in the base game?

Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
